description: A swine farmer wants to select the best boar to breed with a specific sow to improve litter size.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the genetic data and historical performance records for the sow, including her litter sizes.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves the complete record for the sow.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the genetic data (Estimated Breeding Values - EBVs) for all available boars, focusing on the EBV for 'number born alive'.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves the relevant EBVs for all boars.

nodes.task_description: Recommend the top 3 boars that are the best genetic match to improve litter size, while also checking for inbreeding risk.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides a ranked list of recommended boars.
